flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Canada College rose 26% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $11.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Canada College fell 26% between 2009 and 2010 (5.6% → 4.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Canada College rose 110% between 2007 and 2010 (2.6k → 5.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Canada College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (6.0% → 0.0%).
